evals.prompt: Audit the existing README.md and identify issues with structure, badges, code blocks, and sections
evals.expected_output: A checklist report showing which best practices the README follows and which it violates.
assertions: Checks for centered header block with logo and badges
Verifies all code blocks have language specifiers
Checks for Table of Contents if README exceeds 100 lines
Validates badge URLs are not broken
Reports missing sections (Quick Start, Installation, Contributing, License)

evals.prompt: Add shields.io badges for CI status, release version, license, and primary language to the README header
evals.expected_output: A centered badge row in the README header with valid shields.io badge images for CI, release, license, and language.
assertions: Badges use shields.io or GitHub Actions badge URLs
Badges are placed inside a <div align="center"> block
